meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Solve Project Stalls
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client projects. Learn how to leverage AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and maintain high-quality output.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck in freelance development is often 'analysis paralysis' during complex debugging. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural visualization and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based fixes, you move from stuck to shipped. This workflow transforms a stagnant codebase into a modular, testable, and high-performance deliverable in record time.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client’s deadline is a looming shadow, and you are trapped in a recursive loop of 'it worked five minutes ago.' Every freelancer knows the visceral frustration of a project that refuses to cross the finish line—the phantom bugs, the dependency hell, and the sinking feeling that your momentum has hit a brick wall.

But what if you stopped fighting the code and started orchestrating it? By shifting your workflow from manual investigation to AI-augmented debugging, you reclaim your autonomy. This is not just about fixing errors; it is about engineering a repeatable, high-velocity system that turns complex bottlenecks into solved tickets, allowing you to focus on high-value features instead of endless stack traces.

steps.title: Map the Architectural Debt
steps.description: Before fixing, visualize the complexity. Use Antigravity to map your current directory, identifying circular dependencies that cause the 'can't finish' syndrome.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure. Identify circular dependencies and high-complexity modules that are likely causing runtime instability.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Claude Code to create a targeted test harness for the specific module identified as the primary bottleneck.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a focused unit test suite for the identified bottleneck module to isolate the failure state.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed the stack trace and test results into the AI to determine if the issue is logic-based or environmental.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a root cause analysis based on the provided stack trace and test output. Suggest three potential refactoring paths.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --chat 'Analyze this trace and provide a fix for the race condition'

steps.title: Iterative Patching
steps.description: Apply the suggested refactorings using controlled, incremental commits to ensure the fix doesn't introduce regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a refactored version of the problematic function that prioritizes error handling and performance.

steps.title: Validation and Deployment
steps.description: Run a final regression suite to ensure the project is stable enough to ship to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the final codebase for potential edge cases that might affect production stability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'npm run build && npm run test'

pro_tips: Always maintain a separate 'debug-log' file where Claude Code outputs its reasoning; this creates a paper trail for your clients.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Dependency Health Scores' to justify refactoring time to your clients as a value-add.
Configure Claude Code with a custom system prompt that enforces your specific coding standards to minimize post-AI cleanup.
When stuck, ask the AI to 'explain the code like a senior lead' rather than 'fix it' to gain better architectural insights.
Automate your daily status reports by piping the CLI output of your Claude Code sessions into a summary script.
content.next_steps: Implement this workflow on one minor module in your current project. Once the process is comfortable, scale it to your entire repository to see a 30% reduction in debugging time.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your freelance career. By mastering AI-assisted debugging, you aren't just shipping faster—you're building a reputation for reliability that commands higher rates. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
